title: Dustin Weaver
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
[[File:DustinWeaver.jpg|thumb|Dustin Weaver, next to a fan dressed as [[Zayne Carrick]]]]
'''Dustin Weaver''' is an artist of [[Dark Horse Comics]] and was one of the regular artists of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'']] comic series.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Cover art==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook]]''
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 26|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 26]]
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 27|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 27]]
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 28|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 28]]
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 29|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 29]]
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 30|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 30]]
*[[Legacy (2006) 29|''Legacy'' (2006) 29]]

==Interior art==
===Tales===
*{{Tales|23|Shadows and Light}} (2005)
*{{Tales|24|Unseen, Unheard}} (2005)

*[[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]]
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 10|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 10]]
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]]
